shell.firstRunBanner: Tip: import and clean your bibliography first, then audit the manuscript.

project.newSessionConfirm: Start a new session? This clears the manuscript, bibliography, attached sources, and audit report.
project.openConfirmDirty: Open a project and replace the current session?

toolbar.brandSubtitle: Verify your references. Ground your claims.
toolbar.importManuscriptHint: Load a DOCX, PDF, or text/Markdown manuscript (Ctrl+I).
toolbar.importHint: Load .bib, .ris, or CSL-JSON (Ctrl+I). DOCX/PDF extract reference lists when you import those files.
toolbar.exportHint: Save formatted bibliography from the selected CSL style, or citation list in another mode. Shortcut: Ctrl+E.
toolbar.autocorrectHint: Fix common citation issues and fill missing metadata from DOI/PubMed where possible.
toolbar.findDoisHint: Try Crossref, PubMed, and OpenAlex to attach DOIs where none is present.
toolbar.verifyRegistryHint: Run unified registry check (L1 resolution + L2 metadata) on up to {{maxItems}} prioritized rows per run; may apply Crossref/PubMed field fixes. Shortcut: Ctrl+Shift+V.
toolbar.duplicatesHint: Scan the library for likely duplicate entries by title, DOI, and authors.
toolbar.undoHint: Undo last change to the library. Ctrl+Z.
toolbar.clearAllHint: Remove every citation after confirmation. Edit menu includes the same command.
toolbar.clearConfirm: Remove all citations from the library? Undo is available afterward.

sourceFetch.title: Manuscript source fetch
sourceFetch.subtitle: Used during manuscript audit to locate open-access full text for cited DOIs. Registry abstracts still work without this.
sourceFetch.privacy: Saved once on this computer only. Sent to api.unpaywall.org when auditing DOIs — not to Nassila servers.
sourceFetch.institutionalNote: This is not university paywall login. It only enables Unpaywall to find legally open copies. You can attach a local PDF in Masdar; institutional access is future work.
sourceFetch.savedHint: Saved. Open-access lookups will use this address on future audits.
sourceFetch.enhancedOcrHint: Prefer on-device Tesseract (bundled eng/fra) for Latin scanned PDFs. Arabic theses: import DOCX — Tesseract Arabic is deferred until vision/LLM OCR.

localModels.title: Passage grounding
localModels.subtitle: Optional Sanad grounding during manuscript audit. Use a local runner with Nassila GGUFs, or a cloud API key (experimental).

runnerHint.lmstudio: Start the local server in LM Studio. Nassila calls /v1/chat/completions on your base URL.
runnerHint.ollama: Load a Nassila Sanad GGUF in Ollama. Model id must match what ollama list shows.
runnerHint.vllm: Point at your OpenAI-compatible server. Match the model id to what the server exposes.
runnerHint.custom: Any local OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Model id must match your server.

localModels.cloudDisclaimer: Cloud models are not Nassila Sanad — grounding quality is experimental. Paste your API key; base URL is inferred when possible.
localModels.nassilaTierHint: Trained for cite-to-source grounding. Load the GGUF in your local runner, then pick a tier.
localModels.modelPlaceholder: Model id as exposed by your runner
localModels.localKeyHint: localhost accepts any short placeholder key
localModels.privacy: Grounding runs when you audit a manuscript. Text is sent only to the endpoint you configure — not to Nassila.

sanadSetup.title: Set up Sanad
sanadSetup.subtitle: Sanad checks manuscript passages against source excerpts using a local model you run. For the full step-by-step setup, open the guide below.

lmstudio.title: LM Studio
lmstudio.step1: Download a Sanad GGUF from Hugging Face (links above).
lmstudio.step2: Load the model in LM Studio and start the Local Server.
lmstudio.step3: In Nassila: base URL {{url}}, model id {{model}} (or the id LM Studio shows).

ollama.title: Ollama
ollama.hfPullHint: Pull directly from Hugging Face (default tier):
ollama.modelIdHint: Use the model name from ollama list in Nassila's model field.
ollama.modelfileHint: Already have the .gguf on disk? Create a Modelfile with FROM ./your-file.gguf and run ollama create.

vllm.title: vLLM / llama.cpp
vllm.step1: Serve a Sanad GGUF with your OpenAI-compatible server (e.g. {{model}}).
vllm.step2: Point Nassila at your server base URL and the model id it exposes.

sanadSetup.privacy: Grounding sends passage text only to the endpoint you configure — not to Nassila.

notifications.settingsHint: In-app toasts always appear for short actions. OS notifications fire when a long task finishes while the window is in the background.
notifications.notifyOnLongTasks: Notify when long tasks finish (OS notification)
notifications.auditCompleteToast: Audit complete · {{findings}} references · {{pass}} pass · {{warn}} warn · {{fail}} fail
notifications.offline: This action needs a network connection

tabs.referencesHint: Parse, validate, autocorrect, and format your reference library with CSL styles.
tabs.manuscriptAuditHint: Paste or import a full manuscript to map in-text cites to bibliography and run registry/metadata/passage checks per reference.

about.title: About {{name}}
about.subtitle: Verify your references. Ground your claims.
about.shortBody: {{name}} is a quick quality pass for the bibliography you already have: clean, verify, and export.
about.shortWorkflow: Flow: Import → Parse & fix → Verify (Crossref / PubMed / OpenAlex) → Export.
about.privacyShort: Privacy: nothing is uploaded to Nassila. Network calls go only to public scholarly APIs (and your chosen LLM endpoint if you enable it).
about.oss: Powered by citeproc-js, Citation.js, and community CSL styles.

integrity.highTitle: Could not confirm this reference in searched indexes
integrity.highBody: The DOI/PMID did not resolve, or no high-confidence match was found in Crossref / PubMed / OpenAlex. This does not prove the reference is fabricated (it may be new, mis-parsed, or outside coverage) — review manually before submission.
integrity.manualBody: This type is often outside core indexes. Treat as valid when the source is trustworthy.
integrity.summaryHigh_one: {{count}} reference could not be confirmed in scholarly indexes
integrity.summaryHigh_other: {{count}} references could not be confirmed in scholarly indexes
integrity.footnote: Integrity flags are evidence-style hints from automated registry search, not legal or journal certification.

audit.integrityNotice: References marked “unverified” failed database resolution or had no confident match — check before you trust them.

manuscriptAudit.subtitle: Paste or import a manuscript with references. L1 resolves identifiers, L2 compares metadata, L3 checks passages per in-text cite (optional LLM claim grounding).
manuscriptAudit.importBridgeMissing: File import is unavailable (the app bridge is not loaded). Try restarting the app or use a production build.
manuscriptAudit.importEmpty: Imported file is empty or could not be read.

pdfWarning.scan: This PDF contains no extractable text — it is likely a scan. Run it through OCR (e.g. ocrmypdf, Adobe Acrobat) and re-import.
pdfWarning.littleText: Very little text was extracted. The PDF may be partially scanned or use embedded fonts without a Unicode map.
pdfWarning.ocrLowConfidence: OCR confidence was low on some pages; kept embedded text there. For best Arabic fidelity, import the DOCX.
pdfWarning.reversedArabic: Arabic text from this PDF looks character-reversed (broken font encoding). Prefer the DOCX.
pdfWarning.arabicOcrDeferred: Arabic PDF OCR via Tesseract is disabled for now. Prefer importing the DOCX; vision/LLM OCR is planned.

manuscriptAudit.auditRunning: Audit in progress — you can cancel from the toolbar.
manuscriptAudit.emptyManuscriptHint: Paste text or import DOCX / PDF via the toolbar (File menu or Ctrl+I). You can drag a manuscript file onto this area when the desktop provides a file path.
manuscriptAudit.resultsCleanHint: No findings were flagged for mapped citations. Integrity badges and checklist items still merit a quick skim before submission.
manuscriptAudit.llmDisclaimer: When enabled, claim-grounding excerpts are sent only to your chosen LLM endpoint. Verify what your provider retains in their policy. Prefer local stacks (e.g. Ollama on localhost) for sensitive manuscripts.
manuscriptAudit.editorPlaceholder: Paste manuscript text (including references), or use Import to load DOCX / PDF…
manuscriptAudit.connectionsPrivacy: LLM API keys are stored encrypted (when the OS supports it) under the app userData folder (secrets.json). Unpaywall email and these form fields are saved locally in manuscript-audit-preferences.json. Nothing is uploaded to Nassila servers. Outbound calls still go to Unpaywall, registries, and your chosen LLM endpoint when you run an audit.
manuscriptAudit.keyStateSet: API key: stored on this device
manuscriptAudit.apiKeyPlaceholder: Paste provider API key (min. 10 characters when not using local server)
manuscriptAudit.apiKeyPlaceholderLocal: Any non-empty token (Ollama / local often accepts short placeholders)
manuscriptAudit.noReport: Run an audit to see results here.

inputPanel.panelSubtitle: Paste references or drop files, then parse. Resolve DOIs/PMIDs in the row above.
inputPanel.identifierPlaceholder: Paste a DOI, ISBN, PMID, URL, or one identifier per line…
inputPanel.idleComposeHint: Drop bibliography files onto this pane or paste a column of references. Line count updates live.
inputPanel.citationsPlaceholder:
Paste citations here, one per line…

Or drag & drop .bib, .ris, .json, .docx, .pdf files.

Supported formats:
  - BibTeX (@article{…})
  - RIS (TY  - JUR …)
  - CSL-JSON ([{"type":"article-journal",…}])
  - Plain text (Smith, J. (2024). A study…)

outputPanel.panelSubtitle: Live library: edit rows, attach DOIs, and watch style validation.
outputPanel.emptyHint: Import or paste citations in the Input panel, then select a target style.
outputPanel.emptyHeroLine: Tip: citeproc preview updates instantly after you attach a DOI.
outputPanel.scrollDuplicateTitle: Scroll to another entry in this duplicate group
outputPanel.findDoiTitleOnline: Search Crossref, PubMed, and OpenAlex for this DOI
outputPanel.doiTitleConflictField: Title does not match this DOI
outputPanel.doiTitleConflictHint: This DOI resolves to a different article. Keep your title and find the correct DOI, or keep this DOI and update the title.
outputPanel.findDoiForTitle: Keep my title — find correct DOI
outputPanel.keepEntryConfirm: Remove {{count}} other duplicate entries and merge metadata into this row?
outputPanel.emptyFilter: No references match this filter or search.

task.verify: Verifying {{count}} references against Crossref / PubMed / OpenAlex…

raqimResolve.hint: Search scholarly registries and artifact hosts. A candidate is never applied until you select it.
raqimResolve.keyPlaceholder: Title, DOI, PMID, PMCID, or URL
raqimResolve.offline: Connect to search registries and hosts.
raqimResolve.noCandidates: No sufficiently close candidates found. Check the lookup key or keep this row unchanged.

predatoryPanel.matchedName: Journal "{{value}}" appears in the predatory-journal list
predatoryPanel.matchedPublisher: Publisher "{{value}}" appears in the predatory list
predatoryPanel.updateAvailableBanner: A newer community predatory-journal list may be available.

predatoryUpdates.upToDate: Your list matches the mirror snapshot (or no update detected).
predatoryUpdates.newerAvailable: A newer list snapshot may be available ({{version}}).
predatoryUpdates.offlineDisabled: Connect to the internet to update the list.
predatoryUpdates.errorGeneric: Could not reach the list mirror. Try again later.

issuePanel.panelSubtitle: Local validation, registry L1/L2, predatory-journal flags, mismatches, and duplicates.
issuePanel.queueEmptyTitle: Nothing in the signals queue yet
issuePanel.queueEmptyHint: Autocorrect, registry verification, duplicates, or manual deletes will populate this panel.
issuePanel.registryLegend: L1 = resolve to Crossref, PubMed, or OpenAlex. L2 = compare your fields to the registry record (when L1 found a canonical row).
issuePanel.mismatchUnknownCitation: Reference not found (may have been removed)
issuePanel.mismatchJumpHint: Click to scroll to this reference in Output

journalGuidelines.emptyNotes: No journal-specific submission limits are stored for this title yet, but the mapped citation style is active.

workers.stubTier3Note: Deterministic Maktab extraction and Masdar-lite OA source ingest are live. Their LLM facets and the full Tier 3 workflow are planned.

raqim.name: Raqim
raqim.tagline: Reference library — import, validate, verify, export

tasnif.name: Tasnif
tasnif.tagline: Classify duplicates, predatory flags, and issues

sanad.name: Sanad
sanad.tagline: Ground a passage against a source excerpt

sharh.name: Sharh
sharh.stubBody: Deterministic issue explanations for your reference library. LLM-assisted narrative explanations are planned.

maktab.name: Maktab
maktab.stubBody: DOCX, text, pdf.js, and Tesseract O1 extraction are live. The Maktab LLM facet and O2 offline language packs are planned.

masdar.name: Masdar
masdar.stubBody: Masdar fetches open-access source text and extracts locally attached PDFs today. The Masdar LLM facet remains planned.

shahid.name: Shahid
shahid.stubBody: Ground claims against table and figure regions. Multimodal Tier 3 — not available in this release.

tasnif.intro: Triage your library by duplicates, predatory journal flags, and validation issues. Open a category in the reference table to review rows.
tasnif.empty: No citations yet. Import references in Raqim to start triage.
tasnif.duplicatesBody: Likely duplicate groups detected in your library.
tasnif.predatoryBody: Entries matching the bundled predatory journal list.
tasnif.issuesBody: Rows with parse, field, or registry problems.

sharh.intro: Read deterministic explanations for validation issues, registry mismatches, and predatory matches. For full manuscript commentary, Tier 3 workers are planned.

sanad.intro: Paste a manuscript passage and a source excerpt (abstract or paragraph). Sanad checks whether claims are supported using your local LM Studio model.
sanad.passagePlaceholder: e.g. Smith et al. reported a 42% reduction in mortality…
sanad.excerptPlaceholder: Paste the abstract or paragraph from the cited paper…
sanad.tier2LimitNote: Tier 2: excerpt-only grounding. Full-paper and table/figure evidence require Tier 3 (Masdar, Shahid).
sanad.resultsEmpty: Run grounding to see verdict and per-claim support.
sanad.disabled: LLM grounding is disabled. Enable it above or in Settings.
sanad.encryptionBlocked: Secure storage is unavailable; cannot save API keys for LLM calls.
sanad.repairedNotice: Model JSON was auto-repaired before parsing.
sanad.retryNotice: Recovered on a second LLM attempt.
sanad.tier3FutureNote: Deterministic manuscript extraction, OA source fetch, and local PDF attach already route through Maktab and Masdar. The evaluated Tier 3 workflow remains planned.

loop.title: Manuscript audit
loop.intro: Upload your manuscript, resolve cited sources through scholarly databases and open-access services, then audit claims and references in one flow. Attach a local PDF to re-audit one source in place.
loop.offlineHint: Registry and source fetch need a network connection. Bibliography editing still works offline.
loop.bibliographyFirstHint: If your reference list is messy or unverified, organize it in Bibliography first (import, verify, fix DOIs), then return to audit.
loop.previewEmpty: Paste or upload a manuscript with a References section.
loop.previewNoReferences: Could not find a References or Bibliography section.
loop.previewNoInTextCites: No in-text citations detected for Bibliography-based audit.
loop.exportRefsHint: Parse the embedded reference list into Raqim so you can verify, fix DOIs, and dedupe before re-auditing.
loop.exportRefsDone: Sent {{count}} references to Bibliography. Verify there, then run audit with Bibliography library enabled.
loop.exportRefsNoItems: Could not parse any reference rows from the manuscript.
loop.useBibliographyForAuditHint: Use {{count}} curated rows in Raqim instead of re-parsing the embedded References section. Numeric cite keys from export are preserved.
loop.sourcesHint: Resolved via Crossref, PubMed, OpenAlex, and open-access APIs. Select a row for grounding details.
loop.pipelineGap: Open-access source fetch and local PDF attach are live (Masdar).
loop.unpaywallHint: Add your Unpaywall email once in Settings → General to unlock OA full-text fetch for DOIs.
loop.sourcesEmpty: Run an audit to populate cited sources and Sanad verdicts.
loop.auditInProgressBody: {{phase}}{{progress}}. Detail opens when the run finishes.
loop.auditDetailLocked: Finish or cancel the audit to review grounding details.
loop.jumpToBibliographyMissing: That reference is not in Bibliography yet — send references from the manuscript first.
loop.selectSource: Select a cited source to review registry, metadata, and grounding results.
loop.noSourceExcerpt: No source excerpt was retrieved for this cite.
loop.quoteMatchCaveat: Quote presence checks verbatim text only; it does not prove the claim is true.
loop.noClaims: No per-claim breakdown (grounding off, skipped, or parse failed).
loop.noCiteSites: No in-text cites were evaluated for this reference.
loop.masdarPlanned: Masdar uses registry abstracts, open-access text from Europe PMC / Unpaywall, and locally attached PDFs. Broader automatic full-paper coverage remains planned.
loop.attachPdfNote: Extracted once and cached locally by file hash. Attaching re-audits every cite site for this reference.

error.noReferencesSection: Could not locate a References section in this text.
error.bibliographyEmpty: Bibliography library is empty. Export references or import in Bibliography mode first.
error.noInTextCites: No in-text citations detected in the manuscript body.

grounding.repairedNotice: Model JSON was auto-repaired before parsing.
grounding.retryNotice: Recovered on a second LLM attempt.
grounding.overallUnrelated: Model flagged passage as unrelated overall: {{detail}}
grounding.weakPassageAlignment: Weak passage alignment against OA full text

sharhLite.title: Evidence summary
sharhLite.subtitle: Deterministic roll-up of claim verdicts, mapping, and next steps — no extra LLM call.
sharhLite.empty: Run an audit to see an evidence summary.
sharhLite.preflightOk: No blocking identity or mapping issues.
